overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist Sam Porter Bridges traversing vast red sand dunes in a desolate alien desert landscape. The character carries a large cargo load on his back while walking under a bright sky, leaving footprints in the sand as he ascends and descends the dunes.

events.description: small desert shrub briefly appears on the left side of the path
character reaches the crest of the dune and the horizon begins to expand

agents.ego_description: climbing up a steep red sand dune with a heavy backpack, leaving deep footprints in the sand

entered.detail: vast expanse of red sand forming steep slopes
bright sky with scattered white clouds
small sparse vegetation growing on the dune slope

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep red sand dune under a bright partly cloudy sky. A small desert shrub appears briefly on the left at 14 seconds as the character nears the crest, leaving a distinct trail of footprints in the red sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plateau with panoramic mountain views

events.description: cresting the dune reveals expansive distant mountain ranges on the horizon
distant vertical structures appear on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: traversing the flat desert plateau with panoramic views of distant mountain formations

entered.detail: hazy mountain silhouettes spanning the horizon
tall thin poles or structures visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: After cresting the dune, the landscape opens to reveal vast distant mountain ranges under the bright sky. The character walks across the flat desert plateau as distant vertical structures become visible on the left horizon around 32 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large dune formation with rocky outcrops

events.description: large rock formation becomes prominent on the left side
character begins ascending the next large dune slope

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing a large red dune formation with rocky outcrops visible nearby

entered.detail: rocky formation emerging from the sand on the left
steep face of the next large sand dune ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large dune formation with prominent rocky outcrops becoming visible on the left. As the character begins ascending the next dune around 55 seconds, the vertical structures on the left draw closer while the distant mountains remain visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a desolate red desert, moving from the ascent of a single dune into a vast, open plateau. It begins with the character climbing a steep red sand dune under a bright, partly cloudy sky, passing a small desert shrub and leaving a trail of footprints behind. As the character crests the ridge, the landscape opens to reveal a wide desert plateau with distant mountain ranges and faint vertical structures appearing on the left horizon. The scene then shifts as the character approaches a new dune formation characterized by prominent rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera follows the character as they begin ascending the next dune, bringing the distant vertical structures into closer view while the mountains remain fixed on the horizon.
